reason: MCP sidecar, settings persistence, service lifecycle, and Tauri commands are backend command contracts.
Frontend MCP settings and wrappers must stay aligned with Rust command payloads.
Settings UI must reuse existing desktop panel controls, tokens, and accessibility patterns.
The change spans sidecar transport, stored settings, Tauri commands, and React UI.
Reuse existing MCP dispatch and settings UI patterns instead of duplicating contracts.
